description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is made from polished wood, featuring a smooth, ergonomic shape with a slight curve at the butt for shoulder support. The barrel and receiver are metallic, with visible iron sights mounted on top for aiming. The trigger guard and bolt handle are also metallic, and the rifle appears to have an internal magazine, as there is no visible detachable magazine. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military rifles, with a robust and utilitarian appearance. The finish is a combination of matte wood grain and slightly glossy metal components.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock and long blued steel barrel, featuring iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle and barrel alignment, with minimal detail visible except the barrel tip.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, metallic barrel, bolt, trigger, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the bolt handle slightly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's profile, including the stock, barrel, and iron sights, mirroring view 1 but from the other side.
